destinations.evidence: The canonical 0x0820 precompile is registered as a two-phase async/SPC precompile in the port metadata.
destinations.snippet:
pub const PERSISTENT_AGENT_PRECOMPILE: Address =
    address!("0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000820");
...
settlement: AsyncPrecompileSettlement::TwoPhase,

destinations.evidence: The dependency precompile returns the simulated input and actual output pair for 0x0820 async replay.
Wallet validation includes Phase 2 callback gas/value cost decoded from the 0x0820 agent request delivery fields.
Payload delivery settlement supports 0x0820 as two-phase and decodes its delivery config from the agent ABI field offset.
Phase 2 settlement fees for 0x0820 are calculated from the delivery result length without falling back to long-running HTTP block polling.

equivalence_argument: Mapped under current naming: 0x0820 is PERSISTENT_AGENT_PRECOMPILE locally, but it is registered as a two-phase async precompile, returns the required simulation/output pair in revm, decodes callback fields from agent ABI offset 6 in wallet and payload paths, and prices Phase 2 from delivery result length.
notes: Mapped; the local name is Persistent Agent rather than Autonomous Agent.
rationale: The primary merge diff adds AUTONOMOUS_AGENT_PRECOMPILE handling in payload delivery settlement, wallet Phase 2 callback-cost calculation, verifier Phase 2 fee validation, delivery config decoding, and long-running async classification. This result keeps the candidate as a distinct refined invariant because the bounded assignment packet does not contain a newer candidate that clearly supersedes it. Implementation-detail caveat: This is a merge commit with conflict-resolution hunks; some autonomous-agent behavior may have been introduced on the merged branch before this merge, so this commit may be integrating rather than originally defining the behavior.
statement: Precompile address 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000820 should be treated as an async two-phase Autonomous Agent precompile: async output unwrapping should expect the (simmedInput, actualOutput) pair, wallet validation should include Phase 2 callback costs decoded from AutonomousAgentRequest, payload delivery settlement should use Autonomous Agent delivery config decoding, and Phase 2 fees should use autonomous-agent fee calculation from delivery result length.
suggested_falsification_tests: Create an Autonomous Agent async job with a delivery config and delivery result, then assert wallet validation includes callback gas/value costs, payload builder decodes the autonomous-agent delivery config and calculates autonomous-agent Phase 2 fees, verifier accepts the same fee calculation, and AsyncTxMeta::is_long_running returns true for 0x0820.
summary: The 0x0820 agent precompile is implemented as a two-phase persistent-agent async delivery path.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Create a 0x0820 two-phase job and assert revm returns (simmedInput, actualOutput), wallet/payload decode callback fields at 6-11, and builder/verifier agree on persistent-agent Phase 2 fees from delivery result length.
title: Autonomous Agent precompile uses two-phase async delivery
